prediction.reasoning: Based on Disney's historical volatility of approximately 25-30% annually and 20-day time horizon, I applied a geometric Brownian motion model. DIS has shown resilience in recent quarters with streaming growth and park recovery. The slight upward bias reflects positive momentum from recent earnings and holiday season expectations, though macro headwinds create uncertainty. Daily volatility estimated at ~1.8% supports these confidence intervals.
